quote: Cooking is like painting or writing a song. Just as there are only so many notes or colors, there are only so many flavors — it's how you combine them that sets you apart.
author: Wolfgang Puck
title: Celebrity Chef

quote: Food is our common ground, a universal experience.
author: James Beard
title: Father of American Cuisine

quote: First we eat, then we do everything else.
author: M.F.K. Fisher
title: Food Writer

quote: People who love to eat are always the best people.
author: Julia Child
title: Chef & TV Host

quote: The secret ingredient is always love. But it doesn't hurt to add a little butter too.
author: Barbara Kafka
title: Cookbook Author

quote: Tell me what you eat, and I will tell you what you are.
author: Jean Anthelme Brillat-Savarin
title: Gastronome

quote: One cannot think well, love well, sleep well, if one has not dined well.
author: Virginia Woolf
title: Author

quote: Life is uncertain. Eat dessert first.
author: Ernestine Ulmer
title: Food Philosopher

quote: Good food is the foundation of genuine happiness.
author: Auguste Escoffier
title: French Chef
